scripts.deploy: pnpm build && sudo rm -rf /var/lib/server-dash/build && sudo mkdir -p /var/lib/server-dash/build && sudo cp -r .next/standalone/. /var/lib/server-dash/build/ && sudo mkdir -p /var/lib/server-dash/build/packages/frontend/.next && sudo cp -r .next/static /var/lib/server-dash/build/packages/frontend/.next/static && sudo cp -r public /var/lib/server-dash/build/packages/frontend/public && sudo cp .env /var/lib/server-dash/.env && sudo chown -R server-dash:server-dash /var/lib/server-dash && sudo systemctl restart server-dash
